channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump's commerce secretary says new electronics tariff exemptions are temporary, chip tariffs coming
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tariff exemptions announced Friday on electronics like smartphones and laptops are only a temporary reprieve until the Trump administration develops a new tariff approach specific to the semiconductor industry, U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US still won't say whether it will return mistakenly deported man, despite Supreme Court decision
item.description: The Trump administration is doubling down on its decision not to tell a federal court whether it has any plans to repatriate a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported last month and remains confined in a notorious prison in El Salvador, despite a Supreme Court ruling and lower court order that the
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 6 injured after explosion, house collapse in Austin
item.description: One house was "leveled" while another "suffered severe collapse damage" following an explosion in Austin on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: 6 injured after explosion, house collapse in Austin
item.description: One house was "leveled" while another "suffered severe collapse damage" following an explosion in Austin on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, KRON4

item.title: A beloved pet tortoise is reunited with its family weeks after disappearing in a Mississippi tornado
item.description: KOKOMO, Miss. (AP) — Myrtle, a cherished pet tortoise, has been reunited with its family in Mississippi weeks after disappearing during a deadly tornado outbreak in March. “He’s been through a lot,” said Myrtle's grateful owner, Tiffany Emanuel.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIE BATES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 6 injured after house explosion in northwest Austin, cause under investigation
item.description: Several first responders in northwest Austin were at the scene of a house collapse Sunday after several callers heard a loud explosion in the area.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: Trump is 'fully fit' to serve as commander in chief, his doctor says after recent physical
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump’s doctor says the oldest man elected president is “fully fit” to serve as commander in chief as the White House released results Sunday of Trump's recent physical exam.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wedding travel: How to minimize costs to make it work
item.description: Nearly 1 in 10 Americans are going to a wedding this summer that requires at least one night away from home
item.dc:creator: Erin El Issa, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump tariffs bring Democrat disagreements to surface
item.description: President Donald Trump’s tariffs are putting Democrats in a challenging political position as they decide how strongly to denounce his trade policy.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The hierarchy behind the Hawaiian shirts at Trader Joe's
item.description: If you’re shopping at Trader Joe’s and you need the kind of assistance that only a seasoned, veteran TJ’s employee can provide, you might want to look at their shirts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump 'fully fit' to serve as commander in chief, his doctor says after recent physical
item.description: In a report released Sunday, the doctor said in a summary that Trump is “fully fit to execute the duties of Commander-in-Chief and Head of State.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fire at Pennsylvania Governor's Residence was 'act of arson': State Police
item.description: Police said Governor Josh Shapiro and his family were able to safely evacuate after a fire — believed to be an "act of arson" — broke out at the Harrisburg mansion.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Takeaways from AP's report on how flat funding set stage for Texas measles outbreak, might fuel more
item.description: The measles outbreak in West Texas didn’t happen just by chance. The easily preventable disease, declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000, ripped through Texas communities in part because health departments were starved of the funding needed to run vaccine programs, officials say.
item.dc:creator: LAURA UNGAR, MICHELLE R. SMITH and DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Understanding mutual funds: A beginner's guide to investing
item.description: Despite recent stock market slumps and fears in the investment world, it's never a bad time to learn about strategies to boost your investing experience.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US may already be in recession: BlackRock CEO
item.description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said during a recent interview that the United States may already be in a recession or getting very close to one as a result of President Trump’s sweeping tariffs.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, ABC 4

item.title: A bucket of beans and someone's pet turtle: Uber reveals 'most unique' items passengers left behind
item.description: It's no surprise that phones, wallets and keys are often left behind in rideshare vehicles. But a urinal or a taxidermied rabbit? Those are slightly more rare.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, ABC 4

item.title: Texas man suing NFL player over December shooting at car lot in Nashville
item.description: A Texas man who says Titans cornerback L'Jarius Sneed or his personal assistant shot at him while he was sitting inside a Mercedes-Benz on a dealer lot in December is suing for at least $1 million.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, KRON4

item.title: Lawyers for Sean 'Diddy' Combs want jurors at trial questioned about sex, drugs and violence
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Lawyers for Sean “Diddy” Combs are urging a judge to let prospective jurors at the hip-hop mogul's upcoming sex trafficking trial be questioned about their views regarding sex, drugs and violence.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These bars and restaurants are being called the most 'outstanding' in the country
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Foodies and restaurant lovers across the U.S. will need to add some new spots to their lists of places to eat with the James Beard Foundation officially announcing its finalists for this year’s most “outstanding” restaurant and bar in the country.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, KRON4

item.title: Tesla owners should stay vigilant with safety steps as feds combat 'domestic terrorism': retired sergeant
item.description: As violent instances of vandalism against Tesla owners are rising, one crime prevention expert says owners need to be aware of their surroundings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South Carolina executes second man by firing squad in 5 weeks
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — A firing squad on Friday executed a South Carolina man who killed an off-duty police officer, the second time the rare execution method has been used by the state in the past five weeks.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pressed for evidence against Mahmoud Khalil, government cites its power to deport people for beliefs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Facing a deadline from an immigration judge to turn over evidence for its attempted deportation of Columbia University activist Mahmoud Khalil, the federal government has instead submitted a brief memo, signed by Secretary of State Marco Rubio, citing the Trump administration’s autho
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Utah labor leaders in final push to repeal controversial collective bargaining ban
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) -- Labor leaders are racing against the clock as they now have less than a week to get enough signatures to place a referendum on the ballot to overturn one of this year’s most controversial bills – H.B. 267.
item.dc:creator: Yeonseung Kim, ABC 4

item.title: USPS warns about common scams
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service and Postal Inspection Service want to warn consumers to be aware of fraud and spam regarding their mail, and what to do to avoid them.
item.dc:creator: Kayla Baggerly, ABC 4

item.title: Six people have died in a helicopter crash in the Hudson River in New York City, an AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six people have died in a helicopter crash in the Hudson River in New York City, an Associated Press source says. THIS IS A BREAKING NEWS UPDATE. AP’s earlier story follows below.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lawmakers say airplanes bumped each other on runway at Reagan National
item.description: Multiple lawmakers on Thursday said their airplane was bumped by another plane while waiting on the runway at Reagan National Airport.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: How to view the pink moon and Lyrid meteor shower
item.description: People in the U.S. can expect a few celestial treats in the coming weekends, including a full moon and a meteor shower.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: S&P 500 sinks 3.5% as Wall Street swings from euphoria back to worries about US-China trade war
item.description: The losses for U.S. stocks accelerated Thursday after the White House clarified that Chinese imports will be tariffed at 145%, not the 125% rate that Trump had written about in his posting on Truth Social Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Author Jillian Lauren, wife of Weezer bassist, arrested after being shot by police
item.description: Jillian Lauren, author and wife of Weezer bassist Scott Shriner, was shot and injured by Los Angeles police and arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after pointing a gun at officers from her front yard, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump limits tariffs on most nations for 90 days, except China
item.description: Facing a global market meltdown, President Donald Trump on Wednesday abruptly backed down on his tariffs on most nations for 90 days, but raised his tax rate on Chinese imports to 125%.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
